CMI.BlueMap.Warps.Label: Warps
Warnings.Perform.10: cmi tempban [playerName] 5m &cTemporary banned for getting 10 warnings!
CheckForNameChange.NameChangeCommands: asConsole! cmi broadcast !&2[oldname] logged in with new name: [newname]

ImageFrame.Messages.Oversize: &cThat is too big! Max size for a map is {MaxSize}
ImageFrame.Messages.UnableToChangeImageType: &cChanging the image type is currently not supported. Please create a new image map instead.
ImageFrame.Messages.UnableToLoadMap: &cImageMap cannot be loaded, there is a problem while reading the image. Contact server administrators to check the server console for more info.
ImageFrame.Messages.UploadLink: &aOpen {URL} on your browser to upload an image, it is valid for 5 minutes.
ImageFrame.Settings.CombinedMapItem.Name: &bImageMap &f- &f{Name} &7({Width} x {Height})
ImageFrame.Messages.Selection.Begin: &bRight click an Item Frame to select corner 1 and 2
ImageFrame.Messages.NotEnoughSpace: &cUnable to place Combined ImageMap as there is not enough room.
ImageFrame.Messages.Selection.Oversize: &cOversize selection! Max size for a map is {MaxSize}
ImageFrame.Messages.Markers.AddBegin: &aRight click on an Item Frame containing the map "{Name}" to place marker! &bRun "/imageframe marker cancel" to cancel placement
ImageFrame.Messages.Selection.NoSelection: &cYou don't have a valid selection yet.
Settings.CombinedMapItem.Lore: &aRight Click on Item Frames of size {Width} x {Height} to place ImageMap
ImageFrame.Messages.ItemFrameOccupied: &cFailed to place or remove some maps on selected ItemFrame, they are either destroyed, replaced, occupied or protected.
ImageFrame.Messages.PlayerCreationLimitReached: &cYou can only create {Limit} maps at once! Delete some to create new ones
ImageFrame.Messages.InvalidImageMap: &cThis image map had likely already been deleted.
ImageFrame.Messages.AccessPermission.Updated: &aUpdated access for {PlayerName} ({PlayerUUID}), they now have {Permission} permission.
ImageFrame.Messages.InvalidOverlayMap: &cOverlay only works on Vanilla Minecraft maps and without duplicates in selection!
ImageFrame.Messages.Selection.IncorrectSize: &cYour selection's size does not match, {Width} x {Height} required.
ImageFrame.Messages.NoPermission: &cYou do not have permission to do that!
ImageFrame.Messages.Markers.LimitReached: &cYou can only create {Limit} markers on one map!
ImageFrame.Messages.Markers.NotRenderOnFrameWarning: &eWarning: This marker type does not render on Item Frames!
ImageFrame.Messages.Selection.Success: &aSelected {Width} x {Height} Item Frames! &eIf any of them are removed/replaced, you will need to select them again.
ImageFrame.Messages.Markers.DuplicateName: &cThere is already a marker with that name!
ImageFrame.Messages.ImageOverMaxFileSize: &cImageMap cannot be loaded as it is over the max file size allowed. ({Size} bytes)
ImageFrame.Messages.DuplicateMapName: &cYou've already created an image map with that name!
ImageFrame.Messages.NoConsole: &cThis command can only be ran by players!
ImageFrame.Messages.UploadExpired: &cImage upload link had expired, please create a new one.
ImageFrame.Messages.ImageMapAlreadyQueued: &cYou already have another ImageMap queued and processing, please wait!
ImageFrame.Messages.URLRestricted: &cThat URL is restricted and cannot be used to create image maps.

QSFindItemAddOn.player-shop-teleportation.direct-shop-tp: &cThe area around the shop is unsafe!
QSFindItemAddOn.find-item-command.shop-hide-success-mess: &aShop is now hidden from search list!
QSFindItemAddOn.find-item-command.shop-reveal-success-me: &aShop is no longer hidden from search list!
QSFindItemAddOn.find-item-command.invalid-material-messa: &cEither no shops were found or you provided an invalid item! &fTry selecting from autofill.
QSFindItemAddOn.find-item-command.invalid-shop-block-mes: &cThe block you are looking at is not a shop!
QSFindItemAddOn.find-item-command.incorrect-usage-messag: &cIncorrect usage! Try &e/finditem &a{TO-BUY | TO-SELL} &6{item type | item name}
QSFindItemAddOn.player-shop-teleportation.direct-shop-tp: &cYou don't have permission to teleport to shop!
&cYou cannot teleport to your own shop!

CommunityQuests.Quests.PlantTree.description: &fPlant 10 oak or acacia trees and break 10 logs!
CommunityQuests.Quests.MoveIt.description: Just keep on running until your shoes fall off!
CommunityQuests.Quests.FishFrenzy.description: &fCatch 8 cod and 4 salmon as fast as you can!
CommunityQuests.Quests.Egg.description: H1 needs some cake, you can get some eggs!
CommunityQuests.Quests.TestQuest.description:
Kill 100 zombies and pigs! 
Kill 50 skeletons!
CommunityQuests.Quests.CarvePumpkin.description: Lets carve some pumpkins for Halloween!

EliteMobs.chestLowRankMessage: &7[EM] &cYour guild rank needs to be at least $rank &cin order to open this chest!
EliteMobs.bossAlreadyGoneMessage: &c[EliteMobs] Sorry, this boss is already gone!
EliteMobs.chestCooldownMessage: &7[EM] &cYou've already opened this chest recently! Wait $time!
EliteMobs.enchantmentChallengeInventoryFullMessage: &8[EliteMobs] &cYour inventory was full so the item you were trying to upgrade has been deleted! It will be restored if your item is not full by the time you leave the instanced dungeon.
EliteMobs.noPendingCommands: &cYou don't currently have any pending commands!
EliteMobs.enchantmentChallengeConsequencesMessage: &cThere's a 10% chance of losing your item if you lose the fight! Leaving the arena counts as losing.
EliteMobs.enchantmentChallengeStartMessage: &8[EliteMobs] &6Challenge! Defeat the boss to get your upgraded item!
EliteMobs.treasureChestNoDropMessage: &8[EliteMobs] &cYou didn't get anything! Better luck next time!
EliteMobs.dismissEMMessage: &8[EliteMobs] &2/elitemobs &fmenu not working for you? Try &2/elitemobs alt &fto see an alternative version of the menu! &cDon't want to see this message again? &4/em dismiss
EliteMobs.enchantmentChallengeFailureMessage: &8[EliteMobs] &cFailed enchantment! The enchantment did not bind to the item.

Lootin.messages.chestbreak-with-permission: &aBreaking the chest will delete your unique loot and items! In order to break, &2you must sneak while doing so..&a As loot is &2per player per chest&a, only break if really needed.
Lootin.messages.elytra-itemframe-break-with-per: &cLeft click with stick in main hand to break the special elytra item frame.
Lootin.messages.cant-place-double-chest: &cCan't place normal chest near loot containers.
Lootin.messages.look-at-container: &cLook at a container while executing command!
Lootin.messages.no-permission: &cYou dont have permission to the execute command.
Lootin.messages.chestbreak-without-permission: &cYou don't have permission to break loot containers.
Lootin.messages.chest-edited: &cAnother player is viewing this loot container. You can't open it!

Pl3xMapExtras.messages.no-permission: {prefix} <red>You do not have permission to perform this command.
